$comment: Phase 0 coverage baseline (plan/overhaul/README.md §4 rule 3 ratchet + rule 8 test-absorption ledger: 'the Phase 0 coverage baseline never decreases'). Generated with `npm run coverage` (vitest run --coverage, @vitest/coverage-v8; settings in vitest.config.ts: include src/**/*.{ts,tsx}, exclude src/test/**) — totals copied from coverage/coverage-summary.json. Suite state at capture: 253 test files (252 passed, 1 skipped), 1863 tests (1848 passed, 15 skipped). NOT a PR-blocking gate yet: test-consolidation PRs must re-run `npm run coverage` and show these totals did not drop; regenerate this file (and explain the delta) in the same PR when coverage legitimately moves.
